LSE-MS6-MSMATH6-MKT-LAT-02 | MS Math: Grade 6 | Area (Triangles, Quadrilaterals, Polygons) | Mock Trial | Latinx / Latin American Experiences
ELPAC Level 4  |  NWEA ≥1400L

The Garden Plot Case

Click to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
Why does the boy object to the girl's evidence?
Choose the best answer. Select only one.
SMART
SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Produce a complete academic justification. State the boy's claim about the girl's evidence, support that claim with reasoning drawn directly from what he says about the plot, and articulate the conclusion the court is meant to draw from his objection.
CA ELD PI.B.5 | CCSS 6.G.A.1 | MS Math Grade 6: Area of Polygons
